name: Grilled Mahi Mahi with Pineapple
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds mahi mahi fillet (divided into 3/4 and 1/2 pound portions)
4 slices fresh pineapple, each about 3/4 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
Prepare the Gingered Pineapple Marinade by mixing all ingredients. Remove 1 cup of the marinade; cover and refrigerate the remaining marinade for basting. Cut the fish into 4 serving pieces. Place the fish in a shallow glass or plastic dish. Pour 1 cup of marinade over the fish. Cover and refrigerate, turning once, at least 2 hours but no longer than 12 hours.
Generously spray the grill rack with nonstick cooking spray before heating the grill. Heat coals or gas grill. Remove the fish from the marinade; discard the marinade. Cover and grill the fish and pineapple about 4 inches from medium heat for 8 to 12 minutes, brushing frequently with reserved marinade and turning once, until the fish flakes easily with a fork. If the pineapple becomes too brown, remove it from the grill. Discard any remaining basting marinade.
Makes 4 servings.
